meta.notes: Sub-workflow 1d: receives all built-prompt items from orchestrator, filters to media_type=audio and persona=study-bard, generates music with Google Lyria 3 Clip, uploads MP3 to Supabase Storage using native Node.js HTTPS (avoids n8n binary-data empty-body bug), inserts post. Env vars: GEMINI_API_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
